items.name: Velocity Rig

items.name: Grenade Belt
items.description: Swap the shared secondary back to the classic timed grenade toss.

items.description: Increase shared explosive radius by 30%.

items.description: Add 2 damage to every shared secondary detonation.

items.name: Quick Deploy
items.description: Cut shared secondary cooldown by 30%.

items.name: Siege Canister

items.name: Shrapnel Mine Housing

items.name: Heavy Mine Casing

items.name: Ablative Coating
